error_signature: Bad request - please check your parameters
title: OneDrive upload fails with Cyrillic filenames
symptom: When attempting to upload a file with Cyrillic characters in its name to OneDrive, n8n returns a 'Bad request' error.
not_this_if: Error occurs with other file types
root_cause: The OneDrive API may not handle non-ASCII characters properly in the filename, leading to a bad request error. This can occur if the Content-Type header is not set correctly or if the filename is not encoded properly.
fix_steps: Ensure the filename is URL-encoded before sending it to OneDrive.
Set the Content-Type header to 'application/json' in the HTTP request.
agent_instruction: URL-encode the filename and set the correct Content-Type header for the OneDrive upload.
